title: "Run Now" is greyed out when using filters
creator: gredden
content: When using message filters "Run Now" is often greyed out after running a filter and remains greyed out after the filter has completed filtering. (Hung up?) This does not happen if the filter does not find any matching messages. Clicking on another filter and then returning to the first one returns the "Run Now" button to active (not greyed out). Not sure, but the problem might be associated with filters that copy a message file to a Local folder, or delete messages, or move messages to Trash, or all three. I'm stumped. The problem started recently and I'm not aware of any changes I made to Thunderbird.

title: how to turn OFF the message preview when I single-click on message?
creator: alphaa10000
content:
RE: How to turn OFF message preview when I single-click on message?

When in TB message list, and selecting a message for an operation by making a single-click on the message, the selected message opens. When using CNTL key to select several messages together for an operation, each of the messages opens an individual preview pane. I have searched TB's knowledgebase, but apparently no other users have this problem.

title: How to leave messages bold to indicate unread
creator: elena98365
content: When I reinstalled Thunderbird recently, it no longer leaves messages in my inbox bold, the darker font indicating unread until I click on the message. I tried changing the settings, but it doesn't seem to "take". This is annoying because it appears as if I've looked at all emails in my inbox just because Thunderbird is open. I'm not looking at it, I come back, nothing is in bold. It makes it harder to id spam, because at a glance I think everything is OK email I've already looked at.

title: パスワードの入力画面に移るにはどうすればよいか？
creator: ukanruri.55
content: Thunderbirdの画面でプロバイダアドレスと、gmailのアドレスを2つ使っていたのですが、プロバイダの方が受信ボックスごと消えてしまいました。 coplitに相談して、 送信サーバー、受信サーバーともに設定し直しましたが、「セキュリティとプライバシー」の画面で「パスワード」の行を削除してしまいました。 もう一度、「パスワード」を入力すると、復活するというのですが、その入力画面にたどり着けません。 接続を確認すると、送信・受信ともに「安全な接続が確認されました」と出るのですが、実際の送受信はできない状態です 多分、パスワードが入っていないせいだと思います。AIは受信ボックスをクリックすれば入力画面に遷移するというのですが、そんな画面が出てきません
